summary: Iteration 18: POS Analytics and ZATCA Invoice features tested. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working (POS Analytics dashboard, ZATCA QR code, bilingual invoices, VAT settings).

issues: Console warning: <span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic HTML structure warning from React dynamic rendering wrapper spans, doesn't affect functionality
Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - cosmetic accessibility warning

passed_tests: Backend: GET /dashboard/live-analytics returns 200
Backend: live-analytics has required fields (total_sales, total_expenses, net, sales_count, avg_ticket, recent_sales, branch_leaderboard, top_cashiers, hourly_chart, payment_modes)
Backend: live-analytics branch_leaderboard structure correct (name, total, count)
Backend: live-analytics top_cashiers structure correct (name, total, count)
Backend: live-analytics payment_modes contains cash, bank, online, credit
Backend: live-analytics hourly_chart structure correct (hour, amount)
Backend: live-analytics recent_sales structure correct (id, amount, branch, cashier, mode, time)
Backend: GET /invoices returns 200 with VAT fields (vat_rate, vat_amount, total_with_vat)
Backend: POST /invoices creates invoice with VAT calculation
Backend: GET /invoices/{id}/zatca-qr returns QR data (qr_data, seller_name, vat_number, timestamp, total, vat_amount)
Backend: zatca-qr qr_data is valid base64 encoded TLV data
Backend: Non-existent invoice returns 404 for zatca-qr
Backend: GET /settings/company returns VAT settings
Frontend: Live Analytics nav item visible in sidebar
Frontend: /pos-analytics page loads with 'Live POS Analytics' title
Frontend: KPI cards visible (Total Sales, Expenses, Net, Transactions, Avg Ticket)
Frontend: Branch Leaderboard section visible
Frontend: Hourly Breakdown chart section visible
Frontend: Top Cashiers section visible
Frontend: Live Sales Feed section visible
Frontend: Auto-refresh indicator ('Auto-refreshing every 12s') visible
Frontend: Refresh button visible
Frontend: Invoices page loads with VAT column in table
Frontend: Print button opens print dialog
Frontend: Print dialog has bilingual header 'Tax Invoice / فاتورة ضريبية'
Frontend: Print dialog has bilingual labels (Invoice No / رقم الفاتورة, Customer / العميل, Date / التاريخ)
Frontend: Print dialog shows items table with bilingual headers
Frontend: Print dialog shows subtotal, taxable amount, VAT breakdown, total
Frontend: ZATCA QR code SVG visible in print dialog
Frontend: Print button in dialog visible
Frontend: Settings > Company tab has 'Enable ZATCA VAT on Invoices' checkbox
Frontend: Settings > Company tab has VAT Number field
Regression: Dashboard page works
Regression: Sales page works
Regression: Employees page works
critical_code_review_comments: POS Analytics Implementation: Real-time dashboard at /pos-analytics with auto-refresh every 12s, KPI cards, branch leaderboard, hourly chart, cashier stats, live sales feed - all working correctly

ZATCA Invoice Implementation: VAT calculation (15% configurable), QR code generation using base64 TLV encoding (5 tags: seller name, VAT number, timestamp, total, VAT amount), bilingual Arabic+English layout in print dialog
QR Code uses qrcode.react (QRCodeSVG) which renders as SVG - ZATCA Phase 1 compliant
Invoice model updated with vat_rate, vat_amount, total_with_vat, buyer_vat_number fields
Company settings has vat_enabled checkbox and vat_rate field - invoices respect these settings

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All POS Analytics and ZATCA Invoice features verified working)

seed_data_creation: Created test invoices during backend testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 complete. Two major features implemented and tested: 1) Real-Time POS Analytics at /pos-analytics - KPI cards (Total Sales, Expenses, Net, Transactions, Avg Ticket), Branch Leaderboard, Hourly Breakdown chart, Top Cashiers, Live Sales Feed with auto-refresh every 12s. Empty state messages show when no sales today. 2) ZATCA-compliant invoicing - VAT calculation based on company settings (vat_enabled, vat_rate), bilingual Arabic+English print dialog with Tax Invoice / فاتورة ضريبية header, QR code generation using base64 TLV encoding (5 tags per ZATCA Phase 1), subtotal/discount/VAT breakdown in print preview. Settings > Company tab has 'Enable ZATCA VAT on Invoices' checkbox and VAT rate field. All features working correctly. Note: Console warnings about <span> inside <tbody> are cosmetic React wrapper issues, don't affect functionality.
